Your Safe Haven Blockchain

The First Hack, Scam & REKT-Resistant EVM L1 Blockchain

Designed for

Security & Scalability

Haven1 is an EVM-compatible Layer 1 blockchain that brings key principles of traditional finance to Web3. Built-in verifiable identity at the wallet level facilitates recourse mechanisms and security guardrails which allow Haven1 to unlock previously unattainable decentralized finance use cases.

Why Haven1?

Security

Standardized smart contract audits & governed deployment of smart contracts

Mature Governance

7 trusted validators with transaction recourse & dispute mechanisms

Verifiable Identity

On-chain bridge with built-in provable identity framework

Unified Liquidity

Core network protocols ensure concentrated liquidity

Closing the Gap

Between traditional finance & Web3

Retail Investors

Do it All in the Haven1 Portal

All of your DeFi needs in one unified interface: bridge assets, swap, borrow and lend, trade derivatives, stake H1 tokens, and more.

  • Gasless transactions
  • High TPS rate
  • No front-running
  • Under-collateralized loans
Institutions / Traders

Built with Institutional Needs in Mind

Earn yield, trade, borrow, lend and hedge with peace of mind on Haven1's identity-verified, walled garden network.

  • Built-in multisig self-custody
  • 1:1 assets bridge secures and checks fund legitimacy
  • Built-in dispute and recourse mechanisms
  • 100% Audited smart contract ecosystem
Developers

Full Control for Your Application

Build a new application or port an existing one from any EVM chain. Enjoy predictable finances with our dollar-based fee model, and ring-fence your application to specific users based on their credentials.

  • EVM-Compatible
  • Unique fee model
  • Regional permissioning
  • Safeguarded ecosystem

Haven1 Core Concepts

What makes Haven1 unique

Network Level Security

Governance-approved deployed smart contracts ensures 100% smart contract audit coverage

Entirely permissioned ecosystem from developers to validators to investors ensures accountability

Audits are standardized and must meet minimum thresholds to pass governance approval

Haven1 Passport

Interact on-chain with peace-of-mind knowing all counterparties have been verified and all funds screened

Developers can ring-fence applications based on user data like region, verification level, and accreditation

Manage your digital identity from a single place, while accessing an entire ecosystem of applications

Associate multiple addresses to the same identity to enable you to distribute assets across multiple wallets

Dispute Resolution

Just like traditional finance, in the rare event an illicit actor does move funds, anomaly detection will allow for fund clawback

Governance-driven review of user-submitted issues enables fast and fair resolution that can be investigated ecosystem wide

Vibrant Ecosystem

Interact with native protocols or deploy your own

Buy, sell, and explore tokens on Haven1

dApp

Build on Haven1

Complementing Ethereum

Haven1 is compatible with Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), which means that you can start building with the most popular blockchain development tools such as Solidity, Hardhat and MetaMask. Get started by reading our documentation and engaging with our developer community.

1function issueIdentity(
2    address account,
3    bool primaryID,
4    string calldata countryCode,
5    bool proofOfLiveliness,
6    uint256 userType,
7    uint256[4] memory expiries,
8    string calldata uri
9) external onlyRole(OPERATOR_ROLE);

EVM Compatible

Haven1 offers full EVM compatibility, allowing seamless integration with Ethereum tools and infrastructure.

Open Source

Haven1 is fully open source, ensuring complete transparency and enabling developers to effortlessly collaborate and innovate.

Strong Community

Join a vibrant and strong community of leading blockchain developers.

Complementing Ethereum

Haven1 is not a competitor to Ethereum, but rather a complementary blockchain that is designed to support the Ethereum network.

Join the Community

Whether you’re a developer, researcher or blockchain enthusiast, join Haven1’s vibrant community and help us build a new generation of on-chain finance.
